title: [cross-impl] Inconsistent TDMA slot computation across Python/Rust/Zephyr
description: Commits 37563ab77 + 63e9319f9 added lichen_tdma_compute_slot using EUI64 XOR epoch (4-byte LE into buf[0:4]) + hash_32(buf,8) % num_slots per spec/02a:76. But: 1) Python sim/tdma.py:TDMAScheduler.hash_slot uses int.from_bytes(eui64,"big") % n_slots (matches ccp_tdma.json vectors but not spec XOR/hash). 2) Rust lichen-node/tdma_scheduler.rs:slot_for uses lichen_hash_32(eui) % 16 (hardcoded, no epoch/num_slots). 3) C compute_slot loop bug (8-iter on u32 epoch leaves buf[4:8] unmodified). Different behavior for same algorithm. Test vectors claim hash_32 but use big-int mod. Breaks cross-validation. See test/vectors/ccp_tdma.json, generate.py:41, spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md, appendix-design-rationale.md:388.
